name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: Free health insurance of ₹5 lakh per year for hospitalisation
matchReason: Your income (₹18,500/month) is below the ₹25,000 eligibility threshold. No existing health insurance detected.

applicationSteps.title: Find your nearest CSC centre
applicationSteps.detail: Visit locator.csccloud.in — there are 3 centres within 5km of your PIN code (411001).

applicationSteps.title: Carry these documents
applicationSteps.detail: Aadhaar card (original + copy), ration card if available, income proof (any 2 Zomato/Swiggy payment screenshots).

applicationSteps.title: Get your e-card generated
applicationSteps.detail: The CSC operator will verify your eligibility on PMJAY portal and generate your Golden Card on the spot.

applicationSteps.title: Download and save the e-card
applicationSteps.detail: Save the card PDF to your phone. You can also access it anytime at beneficiary.nha.gov.in

potentialSaving: Protects against a single hospitalisation bill that could otherwise wipe out months of income.

name: EPFO Unorganised Worker Registration
description: National database for unorganised workers with accident insurance and social security benefits
matchReason: Gig workers are explicitly covered. Registration takes 10 minutes with just Aadhaar + mobile number.

applicationSteps.title: Go to eshram.gov.in
applicationSteps.detail: Open on your phone browser. No app needed.

applicationSteps.title: Register with Aadhaar + mobile OTP
applicationSteps.detail: Your mobile number must be linked to Aadhaar. If not, update at nearest Aadhaar centre first.

applicationSteps.title: Fill occupation details
applicationSteps.detail: Select 'Transport' → 'Delivery Worker' from the dropdown. Add your bank account for future benefit transfers.

applicationSteps.title: Download your e-SHRAM card
applicationSteps.detail: UAN (Universal Account Number) is generated instantly. The ₹2 lakh accident cover is active immediately.

potentialSaving: ₹2 lakh accident insurance is free. Future social security benefits will compound over your working years.

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accidental death and disability insurance for ₹20 per year — cheapest insurance in India
matchReason: Any bank account holder aged 18-70 qualifies. You have a savings account. You're currently uninsured.

applicationSteps.title: Open your bank's app or visit branch
applicationSteps.detail: Available at all public sector banks and most private banks. Can be done in net banking under 'Insurance' tab.

applicationSteps.title: Select PMSBY and link your savings account
applicationSteps.detail: ₹20 is auto-debited from your account on June 1 each year. That's less than one delivery order.

applicationSteps.title: Note your policy number
applicationSteps.detail: Save the SMS confirmation. Nominees can claim ₹2 lakh in case of accidental death or full disability.

potentialSaving: ₹20/year for ₹2 lakh coverage. If you skip one chai, your family is protected for a year.
